text: Implement self-reflection and system limitation analysis in autonomy loop
description: Add reflection step to the autonomous loop: after completing aims, agent analyzes what worked, what failed, what constraints were encountered, and what system limitations prevented better performance. Uses Aimparency's existing reflection structure (context, outcome, effectiveness, lesson, pattern) to build institutional memory. Loop becomes: discover → plan → execute → verify → reflect → identify improvements → apply improvements → submit. This creates recursive self-improvement where the agent actively works to overcome its own limitations.

status.comment: Split into 3 sub-aims. Done: friction summarizer feeds the durable ERROR log back into next-session context (bc567d2f). Open: wire real LLM reflection to replace the scrollback stub (de22b7f3); auto-propose improvement aims from recurring limitations (4e3d89bf).
